title: [FIRRTL][FlattenMemory] Change FlattenMemory to also convert base types to UInt
body:
This PR changes the logic of `firrtl-flatten-memory` to also convert memories of SInt and Enum type to UInt. Previously, these would have been left untouched. It also affects aggregates containing only a single non-empty field.
This change is done to support downstream passes, like `firrtl-lower-memory`, which require memories to have UInt type.

Fixes #9444.
